title: At the Optician
summary: Sophia visits an optician for an eye test, then talks with the optician, Brian, about choosing new glasses and when they will be ready.

body.speaker: Sophia
body.text: Hi, I have an appointment for an eye test at three o'clock.

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: Welcome. Please take a seat in the chair, and we'll get started.

body.speaker: Sophia
body.text: Thank you. I've been having trouble reading small print lately.

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: That's quite common. Could you read the letters on the chart for me?

body.speaker: Sophia
body.text: I can see the top three lines clearly, but the bottom one is blurry.

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: Alright. Your eyesight has changed a little, so you need a slightly stronger prescription.

body.speaker: Sophia
body.text: I see. Does that mean I need new glasses?

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: Yes, I'd recommend a new pair. Would you like to look at some frames now?

body.speaker: Sophia
body.text: Sure. I'm looking for something light and not too expensive.

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: These metal frames are very light, and they suit your face well.

body.speaker: Sophia
body.text: I really like these. How much do they cost with the lenses?

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: The total comes to ninety dollars, including the lenses for your prescription.

body.speaker: Sophia
body.text: That sounds fair. When will they be ready to collect?

body.speaker: Brian
body.text: They'll be ready in about a week. We'll call you as soon as they arrive.

body.speaker: Sophia
body.text: Great. I'll wait for your call. Thank you for your help.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: Hi, I have an appointment for an eye test at three o'clock.
sentences.translationVi: Chào anh, tôi có hẹn khám mắt lúc ba giờ.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Welcome.
sentences.translationVi: Chào mừng anh/chị.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Please take a seat in the chair, and we'll get started.
sentences.translationVi: Mời chị ngồi vào ghế, rồi chúng ta sẽ bắt đầu.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: Thank you.
sentences.translationVi: Cảm ơn anh.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: I've been having trouble reading small print lately.
sentences.translationVi: Gần đây tôi gặp khó khăn khi đọc chữ nhỏ.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: That's quite common.
sentences.translationVi: Điều đó khá phổ biến.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Could you read the letters on the chart for me?
sentences.translationVi: Chị có thể đọc các chữ cái trên bảng cho tôi được không?

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: I can see the top three lines clearly, but the bottom one is blurry.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi nhìn rõ ba dòng trên cùng, nhưng dòng dưới cùng thì mờ.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Alright.
sentences.translationVi: Được rồi.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Your eyesight has changed a little, so you need a slightly stronger prescription.
sentences.translationVi: Thị lực của chị thay đổi một chút, nên chị cần một độ kính mạnh hơn một chút.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: I see.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi hiểu rồi.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: Does that mean I need new glasses?
sentences.translationVi: Vậy có nghĩa là tôi cần kính mới phải không?

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Yes, I'd recommend a new pair.
sentences.translationVi: Vâng, tôi khuyên chị nên có một cặp kính mới.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: Would you like to look at some frames now?
sentences.translationVi: Bây giờ chị có muốn xem một vài gọng kính không?

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: Sure.
sentences.translationVi: Chắc chắn rồi.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: I'm looking for something light and not too expensive.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi đang tìm thứ gì đó nhẹ và không quá đắt.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: These metal frames are very light, and they suit your face well.
sentences.translationVi: Những gọng kính kim loại này rất nhẹ, và chúng hợp với khuôn mặt của chị.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: I really like these.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi rất thích cái này.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: How much do they cost with the lenses?
sentences.translationVi: Tính cả tròng kính thì bao nhiêu tiền?

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: The total comes to ninety dollars, including the lenses for your prescription.
sentences.translationVi: Tổng cộng là chín mươi đô la, bao gồm cả tròng kính theo độ của chị.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: That sounds fair.
sentences.translationVi: Nghe có vẻ hợp lý.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: When will they be ready to collect?
sentences.translationVi: Khi nào thì kính sẵn sàng để lấy?

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: They'll be ready in about a week.
sentences.translationVi: Kính sẽ sẵn sàng trong khoảng một tuần.

sentences.speaker: Brian
sentences.text: We'll call you as soon as they arrive.
sentences.translationVi: Chúng tôi sẽ gọi cho chị ngay khi chúng về tới nơi.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: Great.
sentences.translationVi: Tuyệt.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: I'll wait for your call.
sentences.translationVi: Tôi sẽ chờ cuộc gọi của anh.

sentences.speaker: Sophia
sentences.text: Thank you for your help.
sentences.translationVi: Cảm ơn anh đã giúp đỡ.

hintStarters.text: When will they be ready to …?

annotations.phrase: an appointment for an eye test
annotations.exampleEn: I have an appointment for an eye test at three o'clock.
Please take a seat in the chair.
I've been having trouble reading small print lately.
I've been having trouble reading small print.
Could you read the letters on the chart for me?

annotations.meaningVi: thị lực của bạn đã thay đổi
annotations.exampleEn: Your eyesight has changed a little.
You need a slightly stronger prescription.
Would you like to look at some frames now?
The total comes to ninety dollars.
When will they be ready to collect?
We'll call you as soon as they arrive.

grammarNotes.title: Present perfect continuous: 'have been having trouble …'
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'have/has been + V-ing' để nói về một hành động bắt đầu trong quá khứ và còn tiếp diễn đến hiện tại. Ví dụ: 'I've been having trouble reading small print lately.'
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'have/has been + V-ing' to talk about an action that started in the past and continues now. Example: 'I've been having trouble reading small print lately.'

grammarNotes.title: Future with 'will' for predictions and offers
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'will + động từ' để nói về tương lai, như dự đoán hoặc lời hứa. Ví dụ: 'They'll be ready in about a week.' và 'We'll call you as soon as they arrive.'
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'will + verb' to talk about the future, such as predictions or promises. Examples: 'They'll be ready in about a week.' and 'We'll call you as soon as they arrive.'

Khi nào thì kính sẵn sàng để lấy? Brian: Kính sẽ sẵn sàng trong khoảng một tuần. Chúng tôi sẽ gọi cho chị ngay khi chúng về tới nơi. Sophia: Tuyệt. Tôi sẽ chờ cuộc gọi của anh. Cảm ơn anh đã giúp đỡ.
criticalThinkingQuestion: How often do you think people should have their eyes checked, and why is it important to do so regularly?
